next_steps: Urgent Hantavirus serology and RT-PCR testing
Bronchoalveolar lavage (BAL) with analysis for infectious pathogens and cytology for hemorrhage
Maintain strict fluid management (avoid aggressive resuscitation due to non-cardiogenic edema)
Detailed urinalysis to assess for signs of glomerulonephritis
Add doxycycline to empiric antibiotic regimen to cover for zoonotic infections like Leptospirosis and Q fever
Monitor hematocrit and platelet trends closely for signs of worsening capillary leak syndrome
Chest ultrasound to monitor for resolution of fluid vs persistent interstitial process
